subcodes.first_line: God willing, mayest thou ever drink from the pure stream of the favors of the immortal King. Render praise unto the All-Sufficient One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله لم یزل و لایزال از سلسال عنایت ملیک بیزوال بیاشامی حمد کن غنی
subcodes.subjects: @presence of; reunion with God, @suffering; rejection of Christ, @praise and encouragement, @thankfulness; gratitude, @spiritual transformation
